name: Rumaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the bacon into 4 portions.
2. Microwave each portion for 2-1/2 minutes on high.
3. Partially cook the chicken livers and divide them into smaller pieces.
4. Sprinkle the cooked bacon with ground cloves and brown sugar.
5. Wrap half a bacon strip around one-half of a water chestnut and one-half of a liver.
6. Microwave in batches of 10 for 3 to 4 minutes on high.
